renalAdjustments.recommendation: No specific dose adjustment required; can be used in patients with eGFR ≥30 ml/min per 1.73 m2
Can be used in patients with eGFR 15-29.9 ml/min per 1.73 m2 based on individual drug characteristics (liraglutide, dulaglutide demonstrated use in this range)
Limited data for most GLP-1 receptor agonists; dialysis patients included in treatment algorithm but individual drug considerations apply

drugs.sourceSnippet: GLP-1 receptor agonist trials. Lixisenatide (ELIXA): kidney eligibility eGFR ≥30 ml/min per 1.73 m2; Liraglutide (LEADER): kidney eligibility eGFR ≥15 ml/min per 1.73 m2; Semaglutide injectable (SUSTAIN-6): patients treated with dialysis excluded; Dulaglutide (REWIND): kidney eligibility eGFR ≥15 ml/min per 1.73 m2
